hero.description: Preview interface for the Green Office 2026 repository. Explore the dashboard structure, category framework, and evidence placeholders currently available in this static site.
hero.preview_only: Preview only — not live dashboard data

mission.heading: Green Office 2026 Content Framework
mission.description1: This landing page introduces the repository's current Green Office structure: resource dashboards, assessment categories, document placeholders, and navigation into the evidence library.
mission.description2: Institutional narratives, campus photography, and activity outcomes should be added only after approved local content is available in the repo.
mission.placeholder_instruction: Replace this preview once approved campus or program imagery is committed under public assets.

executive.heading: Unified Command Center
executive.description: Build-time dashboard snapshot across the six operational resource metrics, prepared from generated static JSON in the repository.
executive.label: Dashboard Preview

assessment.heading: Assessment Matrix Framework
assessment.description: Seven configured Green Office dimensions from the repository category data, presented as a static assessment preview.

evidence.heading: Evidence Library Preview
evidence.description: Preview highlighted evidence entries from the local repository index. Current records are placeholders until approved source documents are committed.
evidence.capability_1: Evidence entries mapped to configured Green Office categories
evidence.capability_2: Placeholder status visible before source files are integrated
evidence.capability_3: Local paths prepared for future approved document uploads

activities.heading: The Environmental Journey
activities.description: Preview slots for activities, campaigns, awareness, and training milestones.
activities.activity_1_excerpt: This space is reserved for approved local activity evidence once real records are added to the repository.
activities.activity_2_excerpt: Add verified campaign summaries, dates, and images before this card is promoted as real content.
activities.activity_3_excerpt: This placeholder avoids inventing dates, attendance, or outcomes until approved documents exist locally.

improvement.label: Lifecycle Narrative
improvement.heading: Improvement Journey
improvement.description: A navigational overview of the configured category flow. Replace with verified program narrative once approved source material is available.
improvement.stage_1_description: Strategic commitments and organizational structure for sustainability leadership.
improvement.stage_2_description: Behavioral change through campaigns, workshops, and institutional engagement.
improvement.stage_3_description: Conservation across electricity, water, fuel, and paper consumption vectors.
improvement.stage_4_description: Segregation, diversion, and responsible disposal across campus operations.
improvement.stage_5_description: Indoor air quality, ergonomics, and emergency readiness standards.
improvement.stage_6_description: Supplier evaluation and environmentally preferred purchasing policies.
improvement.stage_7_description: Management review, target refinement, and certification readiness cycles.

cta.label: Ready to explore
cta.heading: Your next-generation Green Office command center
cta.description: Welcome to the next-generation Green Office dashboard — start with executive monitoring, category review, or evidence discovery.

footer.title: Green Office 2026
footer.description: Static preview. Content and evidence are repository-backed unless marked as placeholder.
